---
title: "Programa"
---

Mañanas: 9:00 - 13:30

Tardes: 15:00 - 17:30

|     |                Mañana                     |         Tarde                          |
|:---:|:-----------------------------------------:|:--------------------------------------:|
|  L  | Intro + Data management                   | Data visualisation                     |
|  M  | Generalised Linear Models                 | git + GitHub                           |
|  X  | Mixed models                              | Reproducible workflows                 |
|  J  | Multivariate analyses                     | GAM + Bayes                            |
|  V  | Causal inference + Functional programming | Student's work                         |
